mapper.sql: select vo.id, vo.order_no, vo.customer_id, vo.product_id, vo.quantity, vo.product_snapshot, vo.total_amount, vo.status, vo.alipay_no, vo.pay_time, vo.submitted_materials, vo.audit_remark, vo.interview_time, vo.interview_file, vo.interview_feedback, vo.visa_result, vo.mailing_address, vo.create_time, vo.update_time, vo.del_flag, vo.interview_slots, vo.supplementary_materials, vo.is_commented, vo.user_remark, vp.is_interview_required, vp.is_physical_required, vc.id as comment_id, vc.rating as comment_rate, vc.content as comment_text, vc.admin_reply as admin_reply, vc.additional_content as additional_content, vc.additional_time as additional_time, vol1.tracking_no as logistics_user_to_agency, vol2.tracking_no as logistics_agency_to_user from visa_order vo left join visa_product vp on vo.product_id = vp.id left join visa_comment vc on vo.id = vc.order_id left join visa_order_logistics vol1 on vo.id = vol1.order_id and vol1.direction = 1 left join visa_order_logistics vol2 on vo.id = vol2.order_id and vol2.direction = 2
mapper.insert:
insert into visa_order
order_no, customer_id, product_id, quantity, product_snapshot, total_amount, status, alipay_no, pay_time, submitted_materials, audit_remark, interview_time, interview_file, interview_feedback, visa_result, mailing_address, create_time, update_time, del_flag, interview_slots, supplementary_materials,
#{orderNo}, #{customerId}, #{productId}, #{quantity}, #{productSnapshot}, #{totalAmount}, #{status}, #{alipayNo}, #{payTime}, #{submittedMaterials}, #{auditRemark}, #{interviewTime}, #{interviewFile}, #{interviewFeedback}, #{visaResult}, #{mailingAddress}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{delFlag}, #{interviewSlots}, #{supplementaryMaterials},
mapper.delete:
delete from visa_order where id in
#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT om.customer_id, om.order_id as id, /* ★ 使用 MAX 聚合函数确保兼容 only_full_group_by ★ */ MAX(vo.order_no) as order_no, MAX(c.nickname) as customer_name, MAX(c.avatar) as customer_avatar, /* 子查询：获取该 客户+订单 组合的最后一条消息 */ (SELECT content FROM order_message WHERE order_id = om.order_id AND customer_id = om.customer_id ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT 1) as last_msg, MAX(om.create_time) as last_time FROM order_message om LEFT JOIN visa_order vo ON om.order_id = vo.id LEFT JOIN c_customer c ON om.customer_id = c.id /* ★ 只统计人工消息 ★ */ WHERE om.is_ai = '0' GROUP BY om.customer_id, om.order_id ORDER BY last_time DESC

select vo.id, vo.order_no, vo.status, vp.title as product_name, vp.image as product_image from visa_order vo left join visa_product vp on vo.product_id = vp.id where vo.customer_id = #{customerId} and vo.del_flag = '0' and vo.status != 6 order by vo.create_time desc

SELECT COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 2 THEN 1 END) as pendingReview, COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 10 THEN 1 END) as pendingPhysical,
IFNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN status > 0 AND create_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 30 DAY) THEN total_amount ELSE 0 END), 0) as monthlyRevenue, (SELECT IFNULL(AVG(rating), 5.0) FROM visa_comment) as avgRating, /* 漏斗数据点 */ COUNT(id) as totalCount, COUNT(CASE WHEN status >= 1 THEN 1 END) as paidCount, COUNT(CASE WHEN status >= 2 THEN 1 END) as materialsCount, COUNT(CASE WHEN status IN (5,6) THEN 1 END) as finishedCount FROM visa_order WHERE del_flag = '0'
SELECT vp.title as name, COUNT(vo.id) as value FROM visa_order vo LEFT JOIN visa_product vp ON vo.product_id = vp.id WHERE vo.del_flag = '0' GROUP BY vo.product_id ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 5

SELECT vo.id, vo.order_no as orderNo, vp.title as productName, CASE vo.status WHEN 4 THEN '使馆办理中' WHEN 9 THEN '等待寄送原件' WHEN 10 THEN '快递运输中' END as statusName, DATEDIFF(NOW(), vo.update_time) as delayDays FROM visa_order vo LEFT JOIN visa_product vp ON vo.product_id = vp.id WHERE vo.status IN (4, 9, 10) AND vo.del_flag = '0' AND DATEDIFF(NOW(), vo.update_time) > 7 /* 超过7天没更新的 */ ORDER BY delayDays DESC
